promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the archived structural-memory wayfinding reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the recurring THREAD_A2 integration target, ZIP and continuity planning lineage, version pressure, mode-control contradiction, boot-order control, and explicit planning-versus-implementation nonclosure.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The archived system-spec batch was used for A2-versus-THREAD_B boundary alignment, the working-context batch was used for continuity and read-first persistence alignment, and the export-pack batch was used for continuation-bundle and minimal carry-set alignment.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the upgrade map is the cross-cutting planning surface that points into the narrower ZIP family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived upgrade-structural-map parent batch plus the archived system-spec, working-context, and export-pack A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable integration, version, mode, boot, continuity, and nonclosure packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_UPGRADE_MAP_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent as archived planning topology rather than adopted system law.

candidate_items.name: THREAD_A2_FORMAL_INTEGRATION_WITHOUT_AUTHORITY_EXPANSION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest recurring target in the map while keeping THREAD_A2 integration from inflating into THREAD_B authority.

candidate_items.name: VERSION_DISCIPLINE_AND_DISTINGUISHABILITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves one of the strongest recurring upgrade pressures in smaller and cleaner form.

candidate_items.name: MODE_DRIFT_CONTROL_WITH_ENFORCEMENT_DOUBT_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the demand for mode control and the admitted enforcement doubt together rather than smoothing the contradiction away.

candidate_items.name: BOOT_READ_FIRST_AND_CONTINUITY_PACKAGING_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest cross-cluster linkage between boot ordering, ZIP-index-first continuation planning, and continuity packaging without importing the whole ZIP doctrine surface.

candidate_items.name: PLANNING_TARGETS_DO_NOT_EQUAL_IMPLEMENTATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest nonclosure guard: recurring targets remain planning pressure rather than completion proof.

quarantined_items.name: PROPOSED_ZIP_TAXONOMY_AS_CURRENT_TRANSPORT_LAW
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch preserves ZIP enumeration, sharding, export-pack, and deterministic-ingestion language as archived planning doctrine rather than current transport law.

quarantined_items.name: DETERMINISTIC_MODE_ENFORCEMENT_AS_SOLVED
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly keeps mode-control demand and enforcement doubt together, so treating enforcement as solved would erase a core contradiction.

quarantined_items.name: REPEATED_THREAD_A2_INSERTION_TARGET_AS_PROOF_OF_IMPLEMENTATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Repeated bounded insertion plans do not override the later statement that THREAD_A2 was still not formally integrated.

quarantined_items.name: A1_A2_MODE_LANGUAGE_AS_CURRENT_ACTIVE_MODE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The archived mode wording here belongs to historical behavioral-control planning and should not self-authorize as current doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_ALWAYS_ZIP_OR_GENERIC_SUBAGENT_CONTAINER_AS_SETTLED_TRUTH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The late SIM and container phrasing is preserved as ambiguity inside the planning map, not as settled ontology.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: integration pressure without authority expansion, version distinguishability, mode-control contradiction, boot and continuity planning, and explicit planning-versus-implementation nonclosure.
They preserve the archived upgrade map as planning history without letting its repeated deltas, ZIP doctrine, or stale control language self-authorize current law.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain transport-law overreads, solved-control overreads, implementation-proof overreads, or ontology-settlement overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used archived system-spec, working-context, and export-pack A2-mid batches as neighboring role, continuity, and packaging anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived upgrade-planning reduction pass.
